examples: Linear correlation analysis indicated that those patients whose living satisfaction degree was low were prone to athymia, anxietas, interpersonal relationship sensitiveness and somatization symptom.
His companionship made it possible for me to shake off my shrinking sensitiveness.
You were surprised at the extent of his knowledge and the sensitiveness of his taste.
The richest heritage is, of course, her indomitable spirit, her great sensitiveness, perception and philosophy of life.
